events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, was born on July 19, 1947, in Hampton, Middlesex, United Kingdom.

angles.name: Guitar God Turns 79
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Brian May! From iconic riffs to astrophysicist, is there anything this man can't do?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Michael Philip Jagger was born on July 26, 1943, in Dartford, Kent, England.

angles.name: Rock Icon Turns 83
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still moving like Jagger! Happy Birthday to the legendary Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV Launched with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'
events.blurb: MTV launched on August 1, 1981, at 12:01 a.m. Eastern Time, with the first video played being "Video Killed the Radio Star" by The Buggles.

angles.name: MTV's Birthday
angles.copy: Remember when music television actually played music videos? Today marks 45 years since MTV launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did it really kill radio? We'll let you be the judge.

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut studio album, 'Definitely Maybe', on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years ago today, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British music forever. What's your favourite track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place (1969)
events.blurb: The Woodstock Music and Art Fair was held from August 15 to 18, 1969, on Max Yasgur's dairy farm in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since the legendary Woodstock Festival. Three days of peace, music, and a whole lot of mud that defined a generation. What a lineup!

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley passed away on August 16, 1977. He would have been 91 in 2026, having been born on January 8, 1935.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, who left us 49 years ago today. The King of Rock & Roll would have been 91. His legacy lives on.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's Death
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur died on September 13, 1996, in Las Vegas. He would have been 55 in 2026, having been born on June 16, 1971.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: Remembering the profound impact of Tupac Shakur, who left us 30 years ago this month. He would have been 55 this year. His words still resonate.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix died on September 18, 1970. He would have been 84 in 2026, having been born on November 27, 1942.

angles.name: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix, who passed away 56 years ago this month. The guitar world was never the same. He would have been 84.

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', on September 26, 1969, in the UK.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: It's 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That iconic cover and timeless tracks – which one is on repeat for you?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon, still delivering those powerful vocals and sharp lyrics.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Liam Gallagher was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the swagger and those unmistakable vocals. What's your favourite Liam track?

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released on October 11, 1971, in the US.

angles.name: Imagine Release Anniversary
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon released the timeless anthem 'Imagine'. A song that continues to inspire peace and unity around the world.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple released the first generation iPod on October 23, 2001.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember the click wheel? 25 years ago, Apple dropped the original iPod, changing how we listen to music forever. What was the first song you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day celebrates the release of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', on October 5, 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 64 years of 007. Who's your favourite Bond and what's the ultimate Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Lennon was born on October 9, 1940, in Liverpool, England, and passed away on December 8, 1980.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon's Birthday
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. A visionary artist whose music and message continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: John Cleese was born on October 27, 1939, in Weston-super-Mare, Somerset, England.

angles.name: John Cleese Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 87th Birthday to the comedy legend, John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of British humour.
